results.title: This Wall Street Firm Just Placed a $725 Price Target on AMD Stock. Here's Why It's Wrong.
results.description: The chipmaker's stock has gotten way too overheated.

results.title: Lakeport promenade project to be complete in August
results.description: LAKEPORT — The beautification of Lakeport Square and an extension to the WOW Trail go hand in hand, and developer Scott Everett said the Lakeport promenade project is expected to be done in August.
